evals.expected_output: Creates meeting file in Acme Corp account folder, updates daily note with full-path links and 4-item checklist
expectations: Account name parsed as 'Acme Corp', topic as 'Experimentation Sync'
Topic capitalized to Title Case
Meeting file created at {config.company_folder}/Accounts/Acme Corp/meetings/YYYY-MM-DD Experimentation Sync.md
Frontmatter has account, date, gong_url, and empty attendees array
File contains all sections: Tasks, Summary, Attendees, New Customer Contacts, Notes, External Summary, Transcript
Daily note updated with FULL PATH links (not short links)
Account link format: [[{config.company_folder}/Accounts/Acme Corp/Acme Corp|Acme Corp]]
Meeting link format: [[{config.company_folder}/Accounts/Acme Corp/meetings/YYYY-MM-DD Experimentation Sync|YYYY-MM-DD Experimentation Sync]]
All 4 checklist items present: Gong Transcript, /ld-summarize-account, /ld-salesforce, stakeholders
Gong URL pulled from account frontmatter
AE and CSM names pulled from account frontmatter for stakeholders line
No blank line between heading and first bullet

evals.expected_output: Creates meeting with default topic 'Call' when no topic specified
expectations: Topic defaults to 'Call'
Meeting file named YYYY-MM-DD Call.md

evals.expected_output: Creates past meeting file, does NOT update daily note
expectations: Topic 'prep call' capitalized to 'Prep Call'
Meeting date 2026-01-15 used in filename
Daily note NOT updated (past meeting)
Output confirms it was not added to daily note

evals.prompt: /ld-meeting Acme Corp Discovery (with agenda and prep content passed)
evals.expected_output: Creates meeting file with agenda and prep sections populated from passed arguments
expectations: Agenda content inserted under ## Agenda section as bullet points
Prep content inserted under ## Prep section
Both sections populated in addition to standard template sections
If no agenda or prep passed, those sections left empty below the heading

evals.prompt: /ld-meeting Acme Corp Demo (account has multiple Salesforce opportunities)
evals.expected_output: Daily note checklist includes all Salesforce opportunity links with labels from field suffixes
expectations: Account frontmatter read for salesforce_opportunity and salesforce_opportunity_* fields
Primary salesforce_opportunity linked as 'Salesforce' label
Additional opps linked with suffix labels (e.g., salesforce_opportunity_renewal -> 'renewal')
Checklist item 3 format: Run /ld-salesforce Acme Corp ([Salesforce](url1), [renewal](url2))
If no opportunity URLs in frontmatter, checklist shows command without links

evals.prompt: /ld-meeting NewCo Discovery (account folder does not exist)
evals.expected_output: Asks before creating the account folder rather than silently creating it
expectations: Account folder checked at {config.company_folder}/Accounts/NewCo/
Folder not found, user asked for confirmation before creating
If meetings subfolder doesn't exist within an existing account, it IS created automatically
Existing meeting files with same name never overwritten

evals.expected_output: Creates meeting file with future date, adds to Upcoming subsection in daily note
expectations: Meeting file created with 2026-04-01 in filename
Daily note for today updated (not the future date's daily note)
Meeting added under ### Upcoming subsection (not ### Today)
If Upcoming subsection doesn't exist, it is created in order: Today, Upcoming, Past
Full 4-item checklist included under the meeting entry
